title: [VPlan] Fold (x | !x) -> AllOnes.
author: fhahn

tests.test_body:
define void @negated_or_i8(ptr %A) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop ]
  %gep = getelementptr inbounds i8, ptr %A, i64 %iv
  %l = load i8, ptr %gep, align 1
  %not = xor i8 %l, -1
  %or = or i8 %l, %not
  store i8 %or, ptr %gep, align 1
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i64 %iv.next, 100
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop
  ret void
}

define void @multiple_vppredinstphi_with_different_predicate(ptr %A, i32 %d) {
entry:
  br label %loop.header

loop.header:                                      ; preds = %loop.latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop.latch ]
  %gep.A = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %A, i32 %iv
  %l = load i32, ptr %gep.A, align 4
  %c.0 = icmp sgt i32 %l, 0
  br i1 %c.0, label %then.0, label %continue

then.0:                                           ; preds = %loop.header
  %div.0 = sdiv i32 -10, %d
  br label %continue

continue:                                         ; preds = %then.0, %loop.header
  %merge.0 = phi i32 [ %div.0, %then.0 ], [ 0, %loop.header ]
  %c.1 = icmp sgt i32 %l, 20
  br i1 %c.1, label %then.1, label %loop.latch

then.1:                                           ; preds = %continue
  %div.1 = sdiv i32 -10, %d
  br label %loop.latch

loop.latch:                                       ; preds = %then.1, %continue
  %merge.1 = phi i32 [ %div.1, %then.1 ], [ 0, %continue ]
  %add = add i32 %merge.0, %merge.1
  store i32 %add, ptr %gep.A, align 4
  %iv.next = add i32 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv.next, 100
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop.header

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch
  ret void
}

define void @test_three_stores_with_different_predicates(ptr %dst, ptr %src, ptr %cond) {
entry:
  br label %loop

loop:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch, %entry
  %iv = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %loop.latch ]
  %gep.cond = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %cond, i32 %iv
  %c = load i32, ptr %gep.cond, align 4
  %c.0 = icmp ule i32 %c, 11
  br i1 %c.0, label %then.0, label %continue.0

then.0:                                           ; preds = %loop
  %gep.dst.then.0 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %dst, i32 %iv
  store i32 1, ptr %gep.dst.then.0, align 4
  br label %continue.0

continue.0:                                       ; preds = %then.0, %loop
  %c.1 = icmp ule i32 %c, 10
  br i1 %c.1, label %then.1, label %continue.1

then.1:                                           ; preds = %continue.0
  %gep.dst.then.1 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %dst, i32 %iv
  store i32 2, ptr %gep.dst.then.1, align 4
  br label %continue.1

continue.1:                                       ; preds = %then.1, %continue.0
  %c.2 = icmp ule i32 %c, 9
  br i1 %c.2, label %then.2, label %loop.latch

then.2:                                           ; preds = %continue.1
  %gep.dst.then.2 = getelementptr inbounds i32, ptr %dst, i32 %iv
  store i32 3, ptr %gep.dst.then.2, align 4
  br label %loop.latch

loop.latch:                                       ; preds = %then.2, %continue.1
  %iv.next = add nuw nsw i32 %iv, 1
  %ec = icmp eq i32 %iv.next, 100
  br i1 %ec, label %exit, label %loop

exit:                                             ; preds = %loop.latch
  ret void
}
